title: Fantasy Weapons x Better Combat
description: A compatibility data pack for Fantasy Weapons and Better Combat
body: This is a datapack that fixes the weapons in [Fantasy Weapons (Medieval Series)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fantasy-weapons-medieval-series) to work with [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus).
